refined_caption: A rodent is visible on the floor of a hospital room. The rodent appears to be in close proximity to patient areas.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see a rat on the floor of my hospital room. This is completely unacceptable and I'm worried about the health and safety implications. I demand that the hospital takes immediate action to address this issue.
voice_text: There's a rat in my hospital room, I'm really concerned about the cleanliness and safety here.
